author_rating_explanation: First author Shiyang Chen is affiliated with Beijing Institute of Technology, Weifang Medical University, Swansea University, and Center for Excellence in Molecular Cell Science. Beijing Institute of Technology is a reputable Chinese university with AI/CS research output, though not in the very top tier. The mixed affiliations and moderate citation count (OpenAlex cited_by_count=813) place this in the 6-8 band, leaning toward the lower end.
